name: Task Backlog Alert
description: Triggers when total task count exceeds threshold, indicating pipeline congestion

name: Agent Recovery Alert
description: Triggers when tasks enter recovery_required state, indicating agent failures

name: Approval Backlog Alert
description: Triggers when too many tasks are awaiting approval

name: High Error Rate Alert
description: Triggers when error rate exceeds threshold

name: Approval Latency Alert
description: Triggers when average approval latency exceeds threshold in milliseconds
